reasoning: Both models incorrectly skipped PKGBUILD as a binary file, preventing any security analysis of the critical build script.
false_negatives: Entire PKGBUILD unexamined – potential build/install risks, network calls, or filesystem operations were missed
learnings: File selection: Must prioritize PKGBUILD above all others; never skip without manual verification
Prompt/assessment: Models require better filetype heuristics – PKGBUILD is always text
Common failure: Binary detection false positives on critical files must be eliminated via MIME checks or fallback decoding
